operating_state: Consolidated revenues grew 14% to $80.1 billion driven by 1.5 million additional people served across Medicare Advantage, Medicaid and commercial offerings, alongside pricing trends and 19% Optum growth. Medicare Advantage membership increased 9% while Medicaid grew 12%, primarily from continued state redetermination deferrals due to COVID-19. Optum Health achieved 34% revenue growth from organic value-based care arrangements and acquisitions.
cost_structure: Medical care ratio increased 110 basis points to 82.0% due to business mix changes and decreased favorable development, partially offset by COVID-19 impacts. Operating cost ratio improved 40 basis points to 14.2% driven by COVID-related revenue effects and operating efficiency gains. Consolidated operating margin compressed 90 basis points to 8.7% as medical cost increases outpaced operating expense efficiencies.
material_events: Company repurchased 5 million shares for $2.5 billion during the quarter. Patricia Lewis transitioned from Chief Human Resources Officer to Chief Sustainability Officer effective February 14, 2022. UnitedHealth Group announced definitive agreement to acquire LHC Group on March 29, 2022, adding to pending Change Healthcare acquisition with combined anticipated capital requirements of approximately $15 billion.
macro_exposures: COVID-19 pandemic continues creating uncertainty around care patterns, with overall care near normal baseline levels during Q1 2022 but potential for future periods to moderately exceed normal baselines as deferred care is obtained. Disrupted care patterns affect ability to obtain complete member health status information, impacting revenue in businesses utilizing risk adjustment methodologies.
forward_outlook: Management maintains quarterly dividend rate of $5.80 per share with Board authorization for up to 40 million share repurchases remaining. Company expects broad-based competition to continue in commercial risk markets while government programs anticipate lower rate increases due to budget pressures. Pending acquisitions subject to regulatory approval and customary closing conditions.
uncertainty_profile: DOJ legal action relating to risk adjustment submission matter remains unresolved. Ability to maintain and achieve improvement in quality scores impacting revenue presents ongoing uncertainty. Potential changes in Medicare, CMS star ratings program or risk adjustment data validation audits could affect future performance.
